kennelTipLean.note: Two 15th-vs-16th bottom feeders and the Kennel can't decide if we win ugly or find a new way to choke. Half the boys reckon easy, the other half are bracing for a one-error meltdown.

kennelTipQuotes.quote: PerthDog: if we can't beat a team with Volkman and Joash in the halves then we should disband

debates.question: Galvin and Burton are named as the halves again — does the pairing last the full 80 or does Ciro shuffle one of them out of the halves during the game?
debates.kennel: The 'worst halves combo in 100 years' thread has 98 replies of people wanting one of them moved.

options.label: Both finish the game in the halves (6 and 7)
Burton shifts to lock/forwards at some point
One of them gets hooked or subbed off

debates.question: Who opens the scoring for the Dogs against the Eels?
debates.kennel: Gameday thread is full of try-scorer predictions, with most punters backing the outside backs against this Eels edge defence.

trivia.question: Which year did the Bulldogs last win the NRL premiership?
trivia.explainer: Canterbury beat the Roosters 16-13 in the 2004 grand final — Andrew Ryan's mob, with Hazem El Masri kicking the goals. Feels like a lifetime ago.

recap.question: Who topped run metres for the Dogs in the Round 13 loss to the Tigers?
recap.explainer: Kiraz ran for 287m and also crossed for a try — basically carried the back five on his own.

washup.headline: Eighth loss and the 'going to click soon' line is wearing thin.
washup.vibe: We got beat 22-16 by the Tigers — yeah, the Tigers. Conceded three tries in the first half hour, fought back through Kiraz and Tuala, then Galvin's late try just made the scoreboard look respectable. Sitting 15th heading into a wooden spoon decider against the Eels is not where any of us thought we'd be.
washup.kennelMood: Cooked and arguing about who to blame
washup.kennelSummary: The Kennel has gone full civil war — SARGE wants Ciraldo AND Gus gone, the Galvin v Critta thread is brutal (Critta apparently ignored Galvin's challenge call), and the 'who's to blame' thread cracked 200 replies in a day. Everyone's pointing fingers, nobody's defending the coach.

kennelHotTakes.quote: We're actually a worse side WITH Critta in it at the moment. How the fuck has that happened.
kennelHotTakes.author: pillow

kennelThreadsThisWeek.title: Round 14 Canterbury Bankstown vs Scummy Eels - Monday 8th June 4:05pm - Accor Stadium, Sydney
kennelThreadsThisWeek.summary: Gameday thread is split between 'easy win incoming' and SARGE-style doom predictions (Eels 26 Dogs 10). JayBee's calling Burton 'the flop of all flops' and wants Galvin sent to Flegg.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Who exactly is to blame for this abysmal season?
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: 223-reply blame game post-Tigers loss. SARGE wants Ciraldo and Gus both gone, diddly reckons 'the walls' are the problem, everyone agrees the buck stops with the coach.

kennelThreadsLastGame.title: Recruitment
kennelThreadsLastGame.summary: Freakzilla doing the maths on $2.5m spent on three centres while we have zero NRL-quality hookers. Marlinfeeder reckons Roosters are better than us in every single position 1-13.

10.question: Salmon's named at 13 — does he start the game at lock?

options.label: No, Burton shifts to lock and Salmon goes bench
No, late change — Salmon out of the 17

10.question: Which edge do the Dogs target most in the first 20 minutes?

options.label: Through the middle — Galvin/Burton kicking game

11.question: Tracey's named at 1 — does he last the full 80 or get yanked early?

options.label: Shifted off fullback mid-game (Crichton or Burton goes back)

11.question: Where does the Dogs' first try come from?

options.label: Burton or Galvin set play / kick
Forward crash off a Hayward dart
Outside back off a broken-field scramble

12.question: Salmon's named at 13 — does he hold the lock spot for the full 80?
12.kennel: The 'why we've regressed' thread has half the Kennel screaming that Salmon at 13 is killing our attack.

options.label: Gets hooked early, Mann finishes at 13
Shifts into the middle, Preston rolls back to lock

12.question: First middle off the bench — who gets the early call against Utoikamanu and King?
12.kennel: Forum's been screaming 'shit middles' all week — bench rotation is going to matter the second the Storm pack rolls forward.

options.label: Jack Underhill gets the early call

13.question: Burton's named at 6 after his Storm masterclass — does he see out the full 80 there, or does Ciro shift him to lock late?
13.kennel: Magic Burton thread is unanimous he's our best 5/8 and only option there

options.label: Shifts to lock in the second half
Gets benched late with the game won

13.question: Who opens the scoring for the Dogs?
13.kennel: Rinakama thread is fizzing after his double v Storm, but Burton's the form player

14.question: Galvin's named at 7 — who actually runs the show next to him in the halves?
14.kennel: The 'worst halves combo in 100 years' thread has 96 replies of pure venom on this exact pairing.

options.label: Burton starts 6 but shifts to lock/13 in the second half
SOS gets dragged on early and takes over playmaking

14.question: Who opens the scoring for the Dogs against Parra?
14.kennel: Kiraz topped run metres last week, Tuala had 2 line breaks — the outside backs are the only ones firing.
